title: The Zombie Apocalypse Mod
description: Turns your game into a zombie apocalypse game
body:
# Zombie Apocalypse

This mod turns the game into a zombie apocalypse game you have to assert yourself against new zombies the world will no longer be the way you knew it before there are 2 new biomes you can find wasteland and desert wasteland but the main features are the changed textures which makes the game look like a wasteland or apocalyptic the different zombie types such as the almost zombies or the zombie spiders

# the world
![The world will be completely changed with new textures, biomes and much more](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/edebd72f5253a9e24e7f7f37dba9a3172a5bcd6a_0.webp)
**The world will be completely changed with new textures, biomes and much more**

# Biomes
![The biomes are an important part of the mod and thus create an apocalyptic atmosphere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/006043bbf04ecd9a70e1b48f9cfbe5967bd20390_0.webp)
**The biomes are an important part of the mod and thus create an apocalyptic atmosphere**

# moon and clouds
![Not only does the world change, the clouds and the moon also change and become red](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1444f3c285d6ec665d956d0962aaafa38947a678_0.webp)
**Not only does the world change, the clouds and the moon also change and become red**

# new mobs
![But what would a zombie apocalypse be without new zombies, exactly the same mobs are added here](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6c052f68d08a91c72d9cd41eaa4269a8c3731ebf_0.webp)
**But what would a zombie apocalypse be without new zombies? Exactly such mobs are added here, from zombie animals to strength. Many types of zombies are represented. Some are spawned during the day while others only appear at night**
